response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, MCP code generators), but this is a people-management role requiring 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, neither of which appears on the resume. There is no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, or leading organizational change, and mobile-platform exposure is limited to one stint maintaining iOS/Apple TV apps. The profile fits a senior/staff IC in engineering productivity far better than an Engineering Manager position.
strengths: Deep developer-tools experience: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), built CI/DevOps infrastructure, and MCP code generators
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management or direct-report experience, a hard minimum requirement for this role
No demonstrated technical leadership role (team lead, tech lead) or organizational change leadership
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth; iOS work was brief and dates from 2015-2016

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
No formal technical leadership track record
